# Reading note (clean fixture)

A clean source file: the secret gate must exit 0 on it.

Two-stage retrieval keeps token budgets flat as a vault grows, because
routing reads only the hub index lines instead of whole pages. Description
quality on the routing lines is the main precision lever.

Clipped outbound links carry ad/search attribution params; documented
tracking IDs inside a URL query string must not trip the entropy gate
(issue #68):

- [maturity model](https://www.smartsheet.com/content/organizational-maturity?srsltid=AfmBOor7RPqK3x9ZtWc5dd2Xw1QhVbnJ4uE)
- https://example.org/read?utm_source=news&utm_campaign=Xk9pQz3rTv8wYb2NdF6mHj4L&fbclid=IwAR2mXt7vQ9pKzY4bN8cJ3dRf6

No credentials, no personal data, nothing to redact here.
